song.title: Above All
song.author: Paul Baloche, Lenny LeBlanc
song.lyrics:
[V1] . A D E 1) Above all powers, . A Above all kings, . D E A E/G# Above all nature |And all created things, . F#m E D A/C# Above all wisdom And all the ways of man, .Bm Bm/A E You were here |Before the world began.|| . A D E Above all kingdoms, . A Above all thrones, . D E A E/G# Above all wonders |The world has ever known; . F#m E D A/C# Above all wealth |And treasures of the earth, . Bm Bm/A C#7/G# There’s no way |To measure what You’re worth.
[C] . A D Chorus Crucified .E/G# A Laid behind the stone; . D You lived to die, .E/G# A Rejected and alone|| .E/G# F#m E D A/C# Like a rose, trampled on the ground, . Bm7 You took the fall, . A/C# D E And thought of me, . A Above all.
